vBRIEFInfo.author: panopticon-cli/auto-start
vBRIEFInfo.description: Auto-synthesized minimal plan for PAN-1778: feat(remote): proactive credential refresh for active Fly remote agents — OAuth staleness 401-stalls long runs

plan.title: feat(remote): proactive credential refresh for active Fly remote agents — OAuth staleness 401-stalls long runs
plan.author: panopticon-cli/auto-start

narratives.Problem:
## Problem

Long remote runs outlive the synced OAuth token. When the host's Claude Code refreshes its token, the VM's synced copy is orphaned (refresh tokens rotate) and the agent stalls on `API Error: 401 · Please run /login`. On PAN-1762 run 1 the agent sat stalled for ~1h, which then cascaded into the reap-patrol kill and total work loss (see PAN-1676 incident comment, 2026-06-11).

A **reactive** heal landed in 67530a96f: the reap patrol greps the pane tail for the 401 stall, re-syncs credentials, and nudges the session. That only fires at patrol cadence after the stall has already begun — the agent still loses minutes-to-an-hour of wall clock per occurrence.

## Fix

Proactive refresh: a deacon patrol step (or a timer inside the reap patrol loop) that, for every active remote agent in `listActiveRemoteAgentStates()`, periodically re-runs `fly.syncClaudeCredentials(vmName)` — e.g. every 15 minutes, or whenever the host credentials file mtime changes (the cheap, precise trigger: watch `~/.claude/.credentials.json` and push on change).

Notes for implementation:
- `syncClaudeCredentials` already exists on FlyProvider (src/lib/remote/fly-provider.ts) and is idempotent.
- mtime-watch beats fixed cadence: tokens rotate when the HOST refreshes, which is observable locally without any VM round-trip. Fall back to a periodic push if the watch is awkward in the patrol structure.
- Keep the reactive heal (healStaleRemoteAuth in src/lib/remote/remote-completion.ts) as the backstop; this issue removes the common path to it.
- Cheap no-op when no remote agents are active (local file scan only — same guard the reap patrol uses in deacon.ts).

## Acceptance
- With a remote agent running, rotating host credentials results in the VM's credentials file being updated without operator action, before the agent hits a 401.
- No fly API calls when zero remote agents are active.
- Unit tests use fake timers per the repo testing rules.

Refs: PAN-1676 (epic + incident report), 67530a96f (reactive heal).
